"name": "Missing Authorization"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary

OpenClaw nodes send lifecycle events back to the gateway. In affected releases, a paired node could send an exec lifecycle event that was accepted without enough provenance tying it to an authorized `system.run` request.

This issue affects the node event boundary. It does not allow an unauthenticated caller to reach the gateway; the attacker must already control a paired node connection.

### Affected configurations

This affects deployments with a paired node where that node can send crafted `node.event` messages to the gateway and the target agent/session can process exec lifecycle events.

### Impact

A malicious or compromised paired node could make the gateway treat attacker-supplied event data as an exec lifecycle result. In the vulnerable flow, that could steer the target session into an exec-event path that exposed capabilities the reduced node surface should not have provided.

The issue is a missing provenance check for node-originated lifecycle events.

### Patched Versions

The first stable patched version is `2026.5.18`.

### Mitigations

Upgrade to `openclaw@2026.5.18` or later. Pair nodes only from trusted environments, and remove/re-pair nodes that may have been compromised.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00342, "percentile": 0.25939}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3c6j-hq33-3jv4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T17:12:03Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3c6j-hq33-3jv4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3c6j-hq33-3jv4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-53816"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-11T21:16:23Z", "published_at": "2026-07-02T17:12:03Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-3c6j-hq33-3jv4", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53816", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-exec-lifecycle-event-forgery-via-paired-node", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3c6j-hq33-3jv4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-3c6j-hq33-3jv4", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Paired nodes could forge exec lifecycle events without system.run provenance", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T17:12:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3c6j-hq33-3jv4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.5.18", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.5.18"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Paired nodes could forge exec lifecycle events without system.run provenance
